'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 1''' was the first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 27]], [[2001]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[David Bailey]], [[Chris Gardner]] and [[Iain Lowson]]. It also contained an original illustration by [[Carl Lyons]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*The [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] {{C|YAV 1-6}}
:*:<small>The destruction of the Death Star: a deciding moment in history.</small>
:'''Characters''': 
:*[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] {{C|MAU 1-4}}
:*:<small>The deadly Sith assassin who served Darth Sidious.</small>
:*[[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] {{C|SIT 1-2}}
:*:<small>Five Millennia of the evil dark side.</small>
:*[[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] {{C|WIC 1-4}}
:*:<small>The brave Ewok who helped the Rebels on the forest moon of Endor.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''': 
:*[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] {{C|COR 1-4}}
:*:<small>'Jewel of the Core Worlds' and seat of Galactic government.</small>
:'''Droids''': 
:*[[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B Medical Droid]] {{C|MED 1-2}}
:*:<small>The expert battle surgeon that turned to the Rebel cause.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''': 
:*[[Darth Maul's double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|Darth Maul's Lightsaber]] {{C|LIG 1-2}}
:*:<small>Secrets of the Sith Lord's double-bladed weapon.</small>
:'''Vehicles''': 
:*[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing Fighter]] {{C|XWI 1-2}}
:*:<small>Full schematics of the Rebels' favourite single-seater.</small>

The Dark Lords of the Sith article includes original artwork by Carl Lyons, depicting [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], [[Freedon Nadd]] and [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]].<ref name="Issue" />
